senses.gloss: The twenty-fifth letter of the Arabic alphabet, written in the Arabic script; preceded by م (m) and followed by ه (h).
The fourteenth numeral symbol of the Arabic alphabet (traditional abjad order, used for list numbering), written in the Arabic script; preceded by م (m) and followed by س (s).
Suffix marking the short or long energetic mood of a verb that is often preceded by لَ (la).

examples.english: Indeed, you either drink water or you die.
I'll definitely help all of you.
and when I get sick it is He who cures me

etymology.text: From the Nabataean letter 𐢕 (l, “nun”), derived from the Phoenician letter 𐤍 (l, “nun”), from the Egyptian hieroglyph 𓆓. See also Classical Syriac ܢ (l, “nun”), Hebrew נ (l, “nun”), Ancient Greek Ν (N), Latin N.

entries.body_html:
ن: النونُ من الحروف المَجْهورةِ، ومن الحُروف الذُّلقْ، والراءُ

واللامُ والنون في حَيِّز واحد.

entries.lexicon_en: Supplément aux dictionnaires arabes by Reinhart Dozy (d. 1883 CE)
entries.body_html: ن: النون، في كتب الدروز، هو الناسوت .. أي (إنسانية الحاكم) الذي يختفي اللاهوت في أعماقه (دي ساسي كرست 2، 83، 9 ص247).

entries.lexicon_en: Habib Anthony Salmone, An Advanced Learner's Arabic-English Dictionary (1889)
entries.lexicon_ar: حبيب سالمون، قاموس عربي انجليزي متقدم للمتعلمين
entries.body_html:
ن
نَ (a. pronominal pref. in the aorist 1st pers. pl. ), We.
b. ( pronominal suff. 3rd pers. pl. in the pret.
fem. ), They.
c. Imp. of
نَأَى

نَا
a. Us.
b. Our.

entries.lexicon_en: Al-Khalīl b. Aḥmad al-Farāhīdī, Kitāb al-ʿAin (d. 786 CE)
entries.lexicon_ar: كتاب العين للخليل بن أحمد الفراهيدي
entries.body_html:
باب الثلاثي الصحيح من النون

قال الخليل: لم يبق للنّون من الكلام ما يجتمع منه ثلاثةُ أحرفٍ صِحاحٍ مستعملة.

entries.lexicon_en: Murtaḍa al-Zabīdī, Tāj al-ʿArūs fī Jawāhir al-Qamūs (d. 1790 CE)
entries.body_html: مِن كتابِ القَامُوس وَهُوَ مِن الحُروفِ المَجْهورَةِ، ومِن حُروفِ الذُّلْقِ، وَهُوَ والرَّاءُ واللامُ فِي حَيِّزٍ واحِدٍ، وَقد تبدلُ مِن اللامِ والميمِ والهَمْزةِ.

entries.lexicon_en: Arabic-English Lexicon by Edward William Lane (d. 1876)
entries.lexicon_ar: المعجم العربي الإنجليزي لإدوارد وليام لين
entries.body_html:
ن alphabetical letter ن

The twenty-fifth letter of the alphabet; called

نُونٌ: it is one of the class termed ذَلْقِيَّةٌ [or liquids]; and is a letter of augmentation.

b2: نّ

with teshdeed, and preceded by a fat-hah, is sometimes redundantly affixed to a word at the end of a verse: see an ex. voce تَوٌّ.

b3: ن, the sign of the dual, with damm, in one dial., instead of kesr, see خَشِيفٌ.

b4: See also صَادٌ.

b5: As a numeral, it denotes fifty.
